mapper.select: SELECT id FROM attendance_record WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND record_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record(emp_id, record_date, clock_in_time, clock_out_time, created_at) VALUES (#{empId}, CURDATE(), NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT w.date AS w_date, w.day_type AS w_day_type, w.holiday_name AS w_holiday_name,
a.id AS a_id, a.record_date AS a_date, a.clock_in_time AS a_clock_in, a.clock_out_time AS a_clock_out, a.status AS a_status, a.absent_hours AS a_absent_hours, a.leave_request_id AS a_leave_id,
l.leave_type AS l_type, l.start_time AS l_start, l.end_time AS l_end, l.days AS l_days, l.reason AS l_reason, l.final_status AS l_final,
o.actual_hours AS o_hours, o.wage AS o_wage, o.final_status AS o_status FROM work_calendar w LEFT JOIN attendance_record a ON w.date = a.record_date AND a.emp_id = #{eid} LEFT JOIN leave_request l ON a.leave_request_id = l.id AND l.final_status IN (0, 1) LEFT JOIN overtime_request o ON w.date = o.overtime_date AND o.emp_id = #{eid} AND o.final_status = 1 WHERE w.date >= (SELECT DATE(created_at) FROM employee WHERE id = #{eid}) AND w.date <= CURDATE() ORDER BY w.date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance_record(emp_id, record_date, status, absent_hours, created_at) VALUES (#{empId}, #{recordDate}, 1, 8, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM attendance_record WHERE emp_id = #{empId} AND record_date = #{date}
